---
title: "02 · Initial data analysis (IDA)"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

> Phase 2 — tutorial style. Governance:
> `.claude/policies/analysis/initial-data-analysis.md`.

**IDA, not EDA.** Check the data is fit for purpose *before* modeling — integrity,
structure, missingness, distributions — **without** peeking at the exposure–outcome
association. A didactic human codebook helps here (distinct from the machine
`metadata/data_dictionary.csv`).

```{r}
#| label: ida
summarytools::dfSummary(raw)   # didactic structure/codebook view
```
